intents.response: To take an order: open Menu, choose a category, add items to the cart, adjust quantities, choose dine-in or takeaway, pick the table if needed, select payment, then complete and print the receipt.
In the cart panel, choose Cash, Card, or GCash before completing the order. For cash, enter the amount received so the system can calculate change, then print the receipt.
Use Table Services to check table availability. Dine-in orders occupy the selected table automatically. When the ticket is completed or cancelled, the table is released.
Open Tickets to review active orders. Use the ticket actions to print, complete, or cancel an order. Completing or cancelling a dine-in ticket frees its table.
Admins can manage stock in Manage Food Items. Use the restock action to add quantity, and watch the bell on Menu for low-stock alerts.
Admins can open Manage Food Items to add dishes, edit prices and descriptions, restock inventory, archive unavailable items, and manage categories.
Admins can open Sales Report for transactions and revenue, or Product Analytics for item performance, slow movers, low stock, and best sellers.
Use Profile to update your own account. Admins can open Settings to add staff, deactivate users, and update store or receipt settings.
I can guide staff through orders, payments, table service, tickets, stock, menu management, reports, and account settings. Ask a short question like 'how do I take an order?'
